codeReview.summary: The commit deletes README_CN.md, README_JA.md, and all present docs/*_CN.md localized documentation files; it also removes direct localized README references from README.md, .goreleaser.yml, and .dockerignore. Static glob/grep checks found no remaining README_CN, README_JA, _CN.md, or _JA.md files or references outside .factory artifacts, satisfying VAL-CLEAN-001 and VAL-CLEAN-002.

summary: Pass: the localized documentation cleanup matches the feature requirements and its fulfills assertions. No blocking or non-blocking issues were found.
